title: Pandemonium — Season 2 Launch
summary: Lanzamiento de Season 2 Pandemonium. DFT y Stormraider vuelven. Shiv rework on-hit. Nuevos items: Doran's Bow, Doran's Helm, Gluttonous Greaves. Hard reset ranked. Arena overhaul.
digest: SEASON 2 · DFT + Stormraider · Shiv on-hit · Zaahen dominante · WASD ranked · Arena rework
highlights: DFT top: Karthus (BROKEN), Brand, Malzahar, Teemo
Hard reset Master+ — ranked soft reset S2

title: Mel nerf + AP Bot Lane meta
summary: Mel nerf significativo. Meta AP Bot Lane emerge: Karthus 55.1%, Hwei +4.2pp. Zaahen nuevo campeón. K'Sante return to meta.
digest: Mel nerf · AP Bot meta · Zaahen new · Karthus ADC 55.1%

title: WR 7.1c — ARAM Speed Buff
summary: Wild Rift patch 7.1c live. ARAM speed buff. Jhin + MF best ADC. Vayne top highest WR. Roadmap: Cho'Gath, Hwei, Sylas para 7.2 (Julio).
digest: WR 7.1c · ARAM buff · Jhin MF best · Vayne top WR
highlights: Jhin + MF best ADC duo WR 7.1c
Vayne Top Lane highest WR — subrepresentado
